feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Integration suite trial account -tile disabled
entry.content:
Hi 

I was trying to create Integration trial account ,have assigned the integration provisional role ,I was able to add capabilities but could find any discover, design, monitor in the integration suite. It appears as attached.

I have tried deleting the subscription, relogging still facing same issue (both normal browser and in incognito mode).Please suggest ideas on this.

Thanks

Priya

entry.title: Connect PO7.5 to Integration Suite?
entry.content:
Hi,

At my customer side we currently have multiple interfaces like ECC backend <=> SAP PO <=> 3rd party
Customer will switch part of the operation to S4HANA and also wants to move from SAP PO to Integration Suite on BTP.

But some of 3rd party connections are really quite complicated and might even be changed in 1 to 2 years, so i feel like the effort to move all of that to IS now, and then still change it later on is not worth the effort.

So what i'm thinking about is a split in some interfaces where we start using IS and PO together.
That will look like S4 <=> IS <=> PO <=> 3rd party.

This way i,
1) only connect S4 to IS (and not also to PO)
2) dont have to worry about the complicated stuff that is between PO and 3rd party
3) take up the work of connecting IS to 3rd party when the time has come for that change they will make

Of course it requires me copy all ICO's on PO to not have ECC as sender (mostly idocs by the way) but have Integration Suite as sender.
So that is some extra work.

Any thoughts on this way of working?
Can i just create HTTP connections between PO and IS to accomplish this scenario?

Any comments are appreciated

Kr

Robert

entry.title: activate IDOC service path in S4 for IDOC receiver connection with CI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are working on SOAP -> IDOC scenario in Cloud Integration(SAP Integration Suite).

As a pre-requisite, we are trying to establish the IDOC connection from "Cloud Integration" to S4.

But we notice that activation of IDOC service path ‘/sap/bc/srt/idoc’ in SAP backend is needed.

But, our BASIS team declines our request stating that it is not allowed as per our organization hardening guidelines. They are asking to find an alternative way to achieve the required functionality.

Could you please let me know the alternate options available to achieve the requirement without additional efforts like interface redesign etc., Thank you!

Regards,

Ramu

entry.title: how can I streaming in xml to json converter on field level
entry.content:
I am using xml to json converter with following config....

Input xml:

<root>
<records>
<profitCenter>100100</profitCenter>
<validTo>9999-12-31</validTo>
<controllingArea>ABC1</controllingArea>
<validFrom>2023-01-01</validFrom>
<createdOn>2023-11-10</createdOn>
<createdBy>I2193</createdBy>
<longText>Chemicals</longText>
<profitCenterText>Chemicals</profitCenterText>
<profitCenterName>CHEMICALS</profitCenterName>
<profitCenterCompanyCodes>1000</profitCenterCompanyCodes>
<profitCenterCompanyCodes>1825</profitCenterCompanyCodes>
</records>
<records>
<profitCenter>567327</profitCenter>
<validTo>2024-01-02</validTo>
<controllingArea>ABC1</controllingArea>
<validFrom>2023-11-20</validFrom>
<createdOn>2024-06-26</createdOn>
<createdBy>SAP_WFRT</createdBy>
<profitCenterText>testing</profitCenterText>
<profitCenterName>TESTING</profitCenterName>
<profitCenterCompanyCodes>1000</profitCenterCompanyCodes>
</records>
</root>

Expected output:

{
"records": [
{
"profitCenter": "100100",
"validTo": "9999-12-31",
"controllingArea": "CSX1",
"validFrom": "2023-01-01",
"createdOn": "2023-11-10",
"createdBy": "I2193",
"longText": "Chemicals",
"profitCenterText": "Chemicals",
"profitCenterName": "CHEMICALS",
"profitCenterCompanyCodes": [
"1000",
"1825"
]
},
{
"profitCenter": "567327",
"validTo": "2024-01-02",
"controllingArea": "CSX1",
"validFrom": "2023-11-20",
"createdOn": "2024-06-26",
"createdBy": "SAP_WFRT",
"profitCenterText": "testing",
"profitCenterName": "TESTING",
"profitCenterCompanyCodes": [
"1000"
]
}
]
}

But getting output as:

{
"records": {
"profitCenter":"100100",
"validTo":"9999-12-31",
"controllingArea":"ABC1",
"validFrom":"2023-01-01",
"createdOn":"2023-11-10",
"createdBy":"I2193",
"longText":"Chemicals",
"profitCenterText":"Chemicals,
"profitCenterName":"CHEMICALS,
"profitCenterCompanyCodes":[
"1000","1825"
]
},
"records":{
"profitCenter":"567327",
"validTo":"2024-01-02",
"controllingArea":"ABC1",
"validFrom":"2023-11-20",
"createdOn":"2024-06-26",
"createdBy":"SAP_WFRT",
"profitCenterText":"testing",
"profitCenterName":"TESTING",
"profitCenterCompanyCodes":[
"1000"
]
}
}

The red record should not come.

entry.title: CPI RFC SCC : An internal server error
entry.content:
Error Details
com.sap.it.rt.adapter.http.api.exception.HttpResponseException: An internal server error occured: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="no"?><rfc:ZSDFU011.Exception xmlns:rfc="urn:sap-com:document:sap:rfc:functions"><Name>read: Connection broken for conversation ID [00000000] when trying to read SCC header</Name><Text>read: Connection broken for conversation ID [00000000] when trying to read SCC header</Text><Message> <ID/>

entry.title: Availability of Event Mesh in SAP Integration Suite trial account
entry.content:
Hi,

As we know Event Mesh is now part of SAP Integration Suite standard license. Do we have any plan to release it in SAP Integration Suite trail account?

Regards,

Souvik

entry.title: Integration Suite (CPI) Synchronous Proxy with Attachment Error
entry.content:
Hello experts

I have the following integration scenario:

1. A synchronous proxy (service consumer) sends purchase order information, including a PDF as attachment to generic proxy dispatcher flow in the IS/CPI. Based on the header values of "SapInterfaceNamespace" and "SapInterfaceName" the processing flow is then called dynamically.

2. The processing flow extracts the attachment and puts it into a property which is thereafter cleared from the message (SAP note 3240138).

3. External REST APIs are called to process the message and also attach the PDF.

4. Based on the processing outcome, a success or failure is returned to the proxy call.

In generally, this works well, but sometimes the proxy call goes on error and the following "PART_BOUNDARY_NOT_FOUND" shows in SXMB_MONI:

In such a case, I see the following log in the proxy dispatcher flow:

Processing exchange ID-10a74212-bf95-45f5-46ff-fb9c-1719846917195-23-2626:
StartTime = Wed Jul 03 08:01:43.915 UTC 2024
StopTime = Wed Jul 03 08:02:04.623 UTC 2024
ChildCount = 5
ModelStepId = MessageFlow_5
StepId = MessageFlow_5
Activities [
{Activity=sap-processdirect:foo?address=/${header.SapInterfaceNamespace}/${header.SapInterfaceName}, StartTime=Wed Jul 03 08:01:43.915 UTC 2024, StopTime=Wed Jul 03 08:02:04.623 UTC 2024}
]

Processing exchange ID-10a74212-bf95-45f5-46ff-fb9c-1719846917195-23-2626:
StartTime = Wed Jul 03 08:02:04.623 UTC 2024
StopTime = Wed Jul 03 08:02:04.623 UTC 2024
Status = COMPLETED
ChildCount = 6
ModelStepId = EndEvent_2
StepId = EndEvent_2
Activities [
{Activity=setProperty[SAP_MarkMessageAsFailed], StartTime=Wed Jul 03 08:02:04.623 UTC 2024, StopTime=Wed Jul 03 08:02:04.623 UTC 2024}
{Activity=Exchange ID-10a74212-bf95-45f5-46ff-fb9c-1719846917195-23-2626 completed, StartTime=Wed Jul 03 08:02:04.629 UTC 2024}
]

Sent response from endpoint:
StartTime = Wed Jul 03 08:02:04.625 UTC 2024
Status = FAILED
ChildCount = 7
Cxf.EndpointAddress = /XiEntrySync
Error = Outbound processing in endpoint at /XiEntrySync failed with message "ClassCastException:java.lang.String (loaded by <bootstrap>) cannot be cast to java.lang.Integer (loaded by <bootstrap>)"
ModelStepId = MessageFlow_4
Activities [
{Activity=processEvent[SentResponse], StartTime=Wed Jul 03 08:02:04.625 UTC 2024}
{Activity=log Fault, StartTime=Wed Jul 03 08:02:04.625 UTC 2024, StopTime=Wed Jul 03 08:02:04.625 UTC 2024}
]

Nevertheless, I don't understand why this is happening once in a while but not all the time. When I look at the response payload from the processing flow back to the proxy dispatcher flow then they look exactly the same for the successful flow and the one in error.

Also, a boundary issue would also indicate some kind of issue with the attachment, but again it fails only once in a while when sending with the attachment and never when there's no attachment present.

Anybody having an idea what could be the issue or encountered the same and found a solution?

Thanks in advance,

Daniel

entry.title: Looping condition failing while polling files from SFTP using poll enricher
entry.content:
I have a requirement to fetch files from SFTP server that start with "EC_Payroll" using poll enricher. I am using a looping process call and the condition expression iam giving is ${header.CamelFileName!='EC_Payroll*'. Currently there are 6 files in the server path and the 6 files are getting processed but the loop is running for a 7th iteration and the flow is failing because of empty xml payload with only namespace tags in the body. Why is this happening ? Is it because of the "Replace" option Iam using in the poll enrich ? Could someone please provide a working looping condition expression ?

Also, the 6 processed files have to move to archive. I configured this in the SFTP adapter. "Post-Processing : Move file to archive" and the archive directory is "/Archive". But the files are not moving to archive. The same files are getting processed multiple times. This is not because of the directory access permissions, because the same thing is working fine when an SFTP sender adapter is being used in the starting of the Iflow instead of poll enricher.

entry.title: How to handle exceptions in Odata receiver adapter in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi All,
We have a requirement to make multiple calls to an SAP EAM OData API. We would get a request with a set of Ids from source system then we have to split those ids into batches and make call to SAP EAM OData API with each batch so here the issue is if the data doesn't exist for any one of the batch the OData  API is throwing exception and the entire flow is getting failed and not getting proceeded for the next batch.
Let us assume we get 10 Ids from source and we are splitting them into a batch of two ids each so we have to make 5 calls to the OData API. Here for the first two batches there are details in OData API and it returned the details for those Ids, for the third batch of Ids there are no details in OData Api so its throwing exception with 400 Bad request and the flow is not getting failed and not getting proceeded for the next 2 batches where the data exists in OData API for those set of Ids.

In HTTPS adapter we have an option to handle the failures as shown below

If we uncheck this we can route the exception messages to a different route and we can handle 

 

Can someone help me how to handle the above-mentioned exceptions in OData receiver Adapter

Thanks & Regards
Pavan Kalyan

entry.title: Getting '403' error accessing S/4 Public Cloud ODATA
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are trying to extract Material Stock (SAP_COM_164) from S/4 Public Cloud system from CPI via ODATA V2 adapter but getting "403" error. 

In S/4, we have created Communication User (added CPI load balancer certs), Communication System (added the user here for Inbound communication) and then created communication arrangement.

ODATA connector:

Error:

Please suggest here. Our tenant is a trial account.

 

Br,

Arvik

entry.title: Event Mesh (Integration Suite) service binding not possible
entry.content:
Hi all,

i am following the instructions of SAP Help for enabling the new EMIS (Event Mesh as Integration Suite capability) and would like to do the setup with S/4HANA public cloud as event sender.

I made sure that the following prerequisite is met:
https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite/sap-integration-suite/initiating-event-mesh

In the next step where the event message client shall be bind I am facing an Info popup which prevents me from proceeding. The step is described here (number 5):

https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite/sap-integration-suite/configure-message-client

The message says: "There are no applications in this space."

Does anyone see the cause of the issue or do I miss any step? I have attached a few screenshots.

Best regards,
Johannes

entry.title: SAP CPI File List through Groovy script with SCC in between
entry.content:
Hi all,

As CPI doesn't come with any standard feature to list files in a directory, I'm using a Groovy script.

// initialize vars
def secureStorageService =  ITApiFactory.getApi(SecureStoreService.class, null);
	def cred = secureStorageService.getUserCredential(aliasCredentials);
	if (cred == null){
	// error handling
	}
	userName = cred.getUsername()
	password = new String(cred.getPassword())
	def exception = ''
	JSch jsch = new JSch();
	Session session = null;
	try {
		session = jsch.getSession(userName, hostName, Integer.valueOf(port));
		session.setConfig("StrictHostKeyChecking", "no");
		session.setPassword(password);
		session.connect();
		Channel channel = session.openChannel("sftp");
		channel.connect();
		ChannelSftp sftpChannel = (ChannelSftp) channel;
		InputStream stream = sftpChannel.get(filePath);
		sftpChannel.exit();
		session.disconnect();
	} catch(Exception e) {
		exception = e.getMessage()
		//Exception Handling 
	}
// output handling

It works as long as the SFTP server is on the internet. What if the server is reachable only through SCC? How can I make my Groovy script work?

Regards.

Cristian

entry.title: Replicating SuccessFactors Entities to SAP HANA Cloud Using Standard SAP to SAP iFlows
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am currently working on replicating SuccessFactors data to SAP HANA Cloud using SAP Integration Suite. My goal is to have an exact copy of SuccessFactors entities available in HANA Cloud tables, which I can then use to build calculation views.

Up to this point, I have developed custom flows to manage the updates, insertions, and deletions of these SuccessFactors entities. However, I am now looking for a way to achieve the same replication using standard, non-billable SAP to SAP integration iflows, (SAP authored from the SAP Discovery Center).

Specifically, I am interested in:

  • Any standard integration packages available in the SAP API Business Hub that support this use case (for specific SF entities, ideally, not through navigation entities).
  • Using these standard iflows to ensure that the data is kept up-to-date and synchronized.
  • Combining these with other services from the SAP BTP if necessary to maintain the data replication with minimum additional cost.

Any guidance on existing packages, configurations, or additional services required would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your assistance!

Best regards, Théo Haastrup

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite: download XML from dynamic SFTP path (step Sender)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

would be possible set dynamically parameter "Directory" (in Sender), I need path like /data/yyyyMMdd% e.g. the folders would be 202407100001, 202407100002, ..., and I need dowload xml files from every folders with name begin of actual date.

entry.title: SAP CPI Max connection limit
entry.content:
One of our processes is generating about a 1000 IDocs through RSEOUT and calling CPI to send the information to a 3PL application. What we are seeing is about 600 of those IDocs reach CPI and get processed successfully and the remaining 400 IDocs end up in Status 02 status indicating it couldn't connect to CPI. We don't even see them in CPI. 

Does anyone know if there is a max CONCURRENT connecting limit in a CPI tenant and how to have it updated?

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Fetching data from sender's mail
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m trying to fetch specific data from the incoming emails since that’s where the info will be coming from, so that i can extract some specific texts and convert them into an xml for some other uses. I'm struggling with fetching specific data and parsing the results in an XML format, the sender mail adapter is well configured i can receive the mails, i tried using content modifier to read the message and store the data but got struggled with the message headers/message body not ending up us an XML format.

this is the iFlow so far ;

 and this is the exemple of the wanted results ;

entry.title: Sending Customers (t-code BD12) to BTP integration suite (SCPI) fails with MDG error
entry.content:
Hi,

Im trying to send customer data via Integration suite to SAP Commerce. 

I have a recent S/4hana trial version. I managed to send MATMAS(products), COND_A (prices) and now im trying to replicate DEBMAS. However when I try to send the data I receive following error:

The current IDoc is related to a customer. Possible IDoc types are:
DEBMAS for customer data
ADRMAS for customer address data
ADR2MAS or ADR3MAS for the customer's contact person address
DOLMAS for the customer's document links

Your system is configured for using SAP Master Governance for Customers. The related business functions and switches are active. This requires DRF Customizing for the client system BTPSCPI. The same is not configured. The IDoc processing cannot continue and is terminated with a short dump.

I tried to follow up with https://me.sap.com/notes/2363365 however I m not able to find all the options described in the note. For example the BTP integration suite is not maintained as Business System not the SAP Commerce as thats a trail.

Is there any option to configure DFR and send DEBMAS data from S/4hana to BTP Integration Suite (former SCPI).

entry.title: SAP BTP CPI - AMQP Adapter
entry.content: How to use AMQP adapter in between an iFlow . I need to read messages from queue every 15 minutes ,so have a timer which is scheduled to run every 15 minutes . But I am not able to read messages from queue in between an iFlow using OOTB components

entry.title: Advanced Event Mesh or APIM when to use what?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

The business requirement is as follows:-  when ever something changes to material (or) new material gets created then the details like quantity, price etc, to be sent to partner system.

We are in initial discussion on what to use when among Advanced Event Mesh(AEM) or APIM?

Does AEM makes sense only in case of Asynchronous publish subscribe model?

End to end message flow would be something like below.

SAP SRM -> BTP app -> Partner system.

 Can you recommend what to use when among AEM or APIM or API?

KR,

Ramu

entry.title: Integrate Jira with SAP CPI - Create Jira ticket via SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to integrate with the Jira to create a ticket/issue via SAP CPI to reduce the usage of the third part tool which does the same thing. 

I have referred the below blogs and tried to create a sample IFlow in the sap cpi but unfortunately, I am unable to proceed further due to the error encountered which states as below. 

The Jira Cloud platform REST API (atlassian.com)

org.apache.camel.component.ahc.AhcOperationFailedException: HTTP operation failed invoking https://<hostname>/rest/api/2/issue/ with statusCode: 415

FYI, I am able to get the details of the existing ticket but unable to create the ticket via CPI. But managed to create the ticket via POSTMAN.

Sample IFLow.

 

Payload used:

{
"fields": {
"project": {
"key": "SDC"
},
"summary": "Demo ticket from the CPI via API",
"issuetype": {
"name": "Task"
},
"description": "PLEASE IGNORE THIS ISSUE TICKET",
"assignee": {
"name": "Imran"
},
"labels": [
"Demo"
]
}
}

Please advice on this. Thanks in Advance
